so... how does this work ?
how does this benefit us ? why it applied to an enemy ? XD
Cards with phantasm will have the cost of the card reduce by one everytime you play a card
But the cost goes up to original cost +x, x being the number of times you played this card
So like this card is 2 cost, by playing other 2 cards the cost will become 0

after you play this card you'll get a copy of the same card but the cost will be 2+1 so 3
And so on
All cards that have phantasm after the original card will disappear when your turn end
